final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: combat enemy stage/banner art set for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate wide encounter stage/banner sheet for a fantasy match-3 roguelike. Subject: four wide horizontal encounter banners in a 2x2 sheet: cavern raider stage, shield guard stage, burning knight arena, prism vault arena. Each banner has an empty central/foreground area for portrait placement and UI overlays. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game stage art, dark-fantasy dungeon, readable at mobile combat header size. Composition/framing: 2x2 sheet of wide banners, consistent horizon and camera height, no characters, no labels. Lighting/mood: tense dungeon encounter, clear environmental identity per banner. Color palette: cool stone, warm torch/gold, fire red/orange, prism cyan/violet, distinct but cohesive. Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery, no UI controls, no characters.
